title: Touch By Meena Kandasamy | Explanation in Hindi | BA Eng Hons
description:
In Touch Meena Kandasamy focuses on the sufferings, frustration, humiliation, suppression, anguish and revolt of the ill-fated marginalized sections of our society. Even gods and sages divide human beings into the rich and the poor, upper caste and untouchables, and spread hatred among human beings.
